name: Residency wristband
tagline: The cheapest way in, and the loudest way out.
description: Embossed silicone band, three colourways, one size. The wristband is also the season pass: wear it on a Wednesday and entry is free. Cycle changes per season; current band gets you in until the next launch.
imageCaption: Residency wristband, bonfire colourway, embossed text
